summary_en: 45M shares (0.40% S/O), ¥100.0B upper limit, open-market acquisition, May 18 - Jun 30, 2026. Stated rationale: capital-efficiency improvement and balanced shareholder return alongside dividends and growth investment.
title_en: Notice on Determination of Matters Relating to Acquisition of Treasury Stock
translation_en_brief: On May 15, 2026, the board of Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group resolved to acquire up to 45 million treasury shares (0.40% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) for an aggregate upper limit of ¥100.0 billion via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange from May 18 to June 30, 2026. The company states that share buybacks serve as a capital-efficiency-improving component of shareholder returns, to be executed opportunistically considering business performance, capital position, growth investment opportunities, and market conditions including share price. Dividends remain the foundational element of the company's return policy, balanced against capital soundness and growth investment needs.
